name: Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual report generation causes late orders and missed discounts. We automate the conversion of delivery receipts into formatted reports instead of manual entry into spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Manual processing of vendor delivery receipts leads to time-consuming report generation.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual processing of vendor delivery receipts leads to time-consuming report generation.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual report generation causes late orders and missed discounts. We automate the conversion of delivery receipts into formatted reports instead of manual entry into spreadsheets.
